arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher explains why Man City are RIGHT to let Kevin De Bruyne leave this summer - despite the midfielder's match-winning performance against Wolves
arts.sum: De Bruyne, 33, confirmed last month that he will be moving on from City at the end of the season, bringing to an end his 10-year stay at the Etihad.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher brands Wolves star a 'lucky boy' after escaping a red card for high challenge that left Man City's Bernardo Silva writhing in agony
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher felt Wolves full back Rayan Ait-Nouri was very fortunate to avoid being sent off in his side's 1-0 defeat at Manchester City.

arts.ttl: De Bruyne not finished yet as he gives Man City crucial win over Wolves
arts.sum: The Belgian is leaving City at the end of the season and still providing good memories thanks to his goal against a team that won its last six league encounters. Kevin De Bruyne scored and gave Manchester City a crucial but barely deserved 1-0 win over Wolverhampton Wanderers and a lift into third place in the Premier League on Friday.

arts.ttl: Man City 1-0 Wolves: Kevin De Bruyne goal enough to keep Champions League qualification bid on track
arts.sum: Man City now unbeaten in nine matches as they edge closer to sealing place at Europe’s top table next season

arts.ttl: Kevin De Bruyne goal edges Man City closer to Champions League qualification
arts.sum: De Bruyne’s farewell continued with a crucial goal to see off Wolves.

arts.ttl: Manchester City v Wolves: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Premier League updates from the 8pm BST kick-off Golden Boot race | Read Football Daily | And mail Taha Erling Haaland is back in the mix but on the bench – he didn’t play any games in April due to an ankle injury. Fellow Norwegian forward Jørgen Strand Larsen is not involved for Wolves; he has six goals in his last six league matches. arts.ttl: Manchester City vs. Wolves: Vitor Pereira's side bidding to end 79-year streak in Premier League fixture
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers will be bidding to end a 79-year streak when they square off against Manchester City in the Premier League on Friday night.

arts.ttl: Man City vs Wolves Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Man City, currently vying for a Champions League spot, host Wolves, who have surged up the table in recent weeks, in a Premier League match set to take place on Friday, May 2nd, 2025, at 20:00 GMT. M...

arts.ttl: PLAY TEAMSHEET: Can YOU name the Wolves team that beat Man City 1-0 in 2003? Or pick YOUR team and guess their starting XI
arts.sum: Every day we'll challenge you to name a different starting XI from the Premier League era. We'll give you a team's rough formation, and the number of letters in each player's name. Then it's up to you!

arts.ttl: Man City vs. Wolves: Preview, Predictions and Lineups
arts.sum: Man City host in-form Wolves on Friday night in the Premier League. Preview includes team news, how to watch on TV, score prediction and more.
